goal: Fix BUG-0001: harden FireflyService.getCategories() against HTML/non-JSON Firefly responses; surface actionable errors via GET /api/categories and optional UI dropdown copy.
risks: B1: Sibling FireflyService methods remain unguarded until post-US-0001 follow-up
B4: No automated tests — manual verification only
B3: getCategories() called from webhook/batch paths — guard must not regress healthy Firefly
